title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarked mixed-provider workflows using Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 on real GitHub issues. He tested four configurations varying which model handled planning versus implementation, evaluated the resulting PRs on seven dimensions, and reported that the mixed-provider approach works effectively for software development tasks.
